text:

>

> =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/141620

> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool

Approved. Thanks. With this patch the pr number 141140 can be closed.
